description: checking memory usage, RAM, GPU memory, free memory, tegrastats, unified memory
content: Jetsons use unified CPU/GPU memory. nvidia-smi shows N/A. Use `free -h` for overview or `tegrastats --interval 1000 | head -1` for breakdown. Never run bare `tegrastats` (it streams forever).

description: running LLM inference, Ollama API, chat completions, sending prompts, generating text
content: Use /api/chat (not /api/generate) for system message separation. Add `"format": "json"` for structured output. For large payloads, write to a file and use `curl -d @file`.

description: running commands remotely, SSH execution, remote commands, interactive SSH hanging
content: Use `ssh host "command"` with quoted command. Never bare `ssh` — it hangs in non-interactive contexts. Streaming commands (top, htop, tail -f, watch) also hang.

description: installing python packages, pip install, wheel, aarch64 ARM64 compilation
content: Some PyPI wheels don't have aarch64 builds. If pip fails, try: pip install --no-build-isolation, or install build deps first (cmake, ninja). For torch, use NVIDIA's Jetson wheels from https://developer.nvidia.com/embedded/downloads.
